1.title: Getting Started with Affilabs
1.content:
Affilabs is Affinité Instruments' SPR data acquisition software. To get started:

1. Connect your SPR instrument via USB
2. Launch Affilabs - it will auto-detect your device
3. Run OEM LED Calibration (Settings tab)
4. Start acquiring data using the Start Recording button

For detailed tutorials, visit the Support section on our website.

2.title: SPR Technology Overview
2.content:
Surface Plasmon Resonance (SPR) is a label-free detection method for measuring biomolecular interactions in real-time. Affinité Instruments provides compact, user-friendly SPR systems suitable for research and quality control applications.

Our instruments offer:
• Multi-channel detection (up to 4 channels)
• Real-time kinetic measurements
• Temperature control
• Integrated microfluidics

Learn more about SPR technology on our website.

3.title: Contact Support
3.content:
For technical support, questions, or assistance:

• Email: info@affiniteinstruments.com
• Website: https://www.affiniteinstruments.com/
• Submit questions through our contact form

Our support team typically responds within 1 business day.

4.title: Method Builder - Complete Syntax Guide
4.content:
The Method Builder lets you create automated experiment sequences (methods). Each method is a series of timed cycles that run back-to-back.

BASIC CYCLE FORMAT:
Type Duration [Channel:Concentration] [Modifiers]

CYCLE TYPES:
• Baseline (BL) - Running buffer only
• Binding (BN) - Manual injection with contact time
• Kinetic (KN) - Flow injection (association + dissociation)
• Regeneration (RG) - Strip bound analyte
• Immobilization (IM) - Attach ligand to sensor
• Blocking (BK) - Block unreacted surface
• Wash (WS) - Rinse flow path
• Other (OT) - Custom steps

DURATION EXAMPLES:
5s, 30sec, 5min, 5m, 2h, 2hr, overnight (=8h)

CONTACT TIME (for injections):
contact 180s, contact 3min, contact 5h (auto-enables Overnight Mode if >3h)

PARAMETER SHORTCUTS:
fr 50 (flow rate 50 µL/min) - shorthand for 'flow 50'
iv 25 (injection volume 25 µL)

MODIFIERS:
partial - 30 µL spike injection (vs full loop)
manual/automated - override injection mode
detection priority/off - adjust sensitivity

CHANNELS:
A, B, C, D, ALL (default)
Per-channel: A:100nM B:50nM (mix concentrations)

QUICK EXAMPLES:
Baseline 5min
BN 5min A:100nM contact 180s
KN 5min A:100nM fr 50 contact 3min
RG 30sec ALL:50mM

5.title: Cycle Type Abbreviations
5.content:
Use these 2-letter abbreviations anywhere instead of full cycle type names:

BL = Baseline - Running buffer only, establishes stable signal
BN = Binding - Manual injection with contact time (5 min default)
IM = Immobilization - Attach ligand to sensor surface
BK = Blocking - Block unreacted surface sites
KN = Kinetic - Flow injection (association + dissociation phases)
CN = Concentration - Alias for Binding (deprecated, use BN)
RG = Regeneration - Strip bound analyte, restore baseline (30s default)
AS = Association - Alias for Kinetic (deprecated, use KN)
DS = Dissociation - Alias for Baseline (deprecated, use BL)
WS = Wash - Rinse flow path between steps
OT = Other - Custom steps (activation, equilibration, etc.)

EXAMPLES:
BL 5min (instead of Baseline 5min)
BN 5min A:100nM contact 180s (instead of Binding 5min A:100nM contact 180s)

6.title: Duration Shortcuts and Time Units
6.content:
Flexible duration format:

SECONDS: 5s OR 5sec
MINUTES: 5m OR 5min
HOURS: 2h OR 2hr
SPECIAL: overnight (= 8 hours, auto-enables Overnight Mode)

EXAMPLES:
Baseline 30sec - 30 seconds
Binding 5min - 5 minutes
Baseline 2h - 2 hours
Baseline overnight - 8 hours (perfect for stability tests)

CONTACT TIME with HOURS:
contact 5h - 5 hours incubation (18,000 seconds)
contact 3m - 3 minutes (180 seconds)
⚠️ IMPORTANT: Contact times > 3 hours AUTO-ENABLE OVERNIGHT MODE

7.title: Parameter Shorthand (fr and iv)
7.content:
Express flow rate and injection volume concisely:

FLOW RATE SHORTHAND:
fr 50 = same as 'flow 50' = 50 µL/min
Add to Kinetic cycles to control pump speed

INJECTION VOLUME SHORTHAND:
iv 25 = 25 µL injection volume
Add to any injection cycle

EXAMPLES:
Kinetic 5min A:100nM fr 50
Binding 5min A:100nM iv 25
Kinetic 5min A:100nM fr 50 iv 25 contact 3min (both parameters)

💡 Use fr for flow-based experiments, iv to customize injection size

8.title: In-Place Cycle Editing (#N Commands)
8.content:
Edit cycles in the method table without removing them:

SYNTAX:
#N [modifiers] - Edit cycle number N
#2-5 [modifiers] - Edit range (cycles 2 through 5)
#all [modifiers] - Edit ALL cycles

EXAMPLES:
#3 contact 120s - Change cycle 3 contact time to 2 minutes
#3 channels BD - Restrict cycle 3 to channels B & D
#2-5 detection priority - Apply detection priority to cycles 2-5
#all detection off - Disable detection on ALL cycles
#3 contact 120s channels BD detection priority - Multiple mods at once

WORKFLOW:
1. Method table shows your queued cycles
2. Type an #N command in the Note field
3. Click '➕ Add to Method'
4. Changes apply immediately to the selected cycle(s)

9.title: Channel Selection and Concentration Tags
9.content:
CHANNEL FORMATS:
channels A - Single channel
channels BD - Multiple channels (B and D)
channels ALL - All channels (default)

CONCENTRATION TAGS:
Format: Channel:ValueUnit or [Channel:ValueUnit] (brackets optional)
Channels: A, B, C, D, ALL
Units: nM, µM, pM, mM, M, mg/mL, µg/mL, ng/mL

EXAMPLES:
A:100nM - Channel A at 100 nanoM
B:50µM - Channel B at 50 microM
ALL:25pM - All channels at 25 picoM
A:100nM B:50nM - Different concentrations per channel

PURPOSE:
Tags are for documentation and workflow tracking. They don't affect injection volume or flow rate calculations.

10.title: Presets and Templates

11.title: Common Method Examples
11.content:
SIMPLE BINDING:
Baseline 5min
Binding 5min A:100nM contact 180s
Regeneration 30sec ALL:50mM

DOSE-RESPONSE TITRATION:
Baseline 5min
Binding 5min A:10nM contact 180s
Regeneration 30sec ALL:50mM
Baseline 2min
Binding 5min A:50nM contact 180s
Regeneration 30sec ALL:50mM
(Add more concentrations: 100nM, 500nM)

KINETICS (Association + Dissociation):
Baseline 2min
Kinetic 5min A:100nM contact 120s
Baseline 10min (dissociation phase)
Regeneration 30sec ALL:50mM

OVERNIGHT STABILITY TEST:
Baseline overnight (8 hours, auto-enables Overnight Mode)
Baseline 12h (12 hours)
Baseline 24hr (24 hours)

AMINE COUPLING WITH IMMOBILIZATION:
Baseline 30sec
Other 4min (EDC/NHS activation)
Immobilization 4min A:50µg/mL contact 180s
Wash 30sec
Other 4min (ethanolamine blocking)
Wash 30sec
Baseline 15min
(Add titration cycles)
